refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area by identifying terrain features, detecting obstacles, and representing the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad worksite mapping requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and targeted verification. Terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation are distinct aspects critical for operational safety and planning.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify through sensor data validation, obstacle detection accuracy tests, and work-zone model correctness via simulation and field trials.
sub_frs: FR1: Identify and characterize terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Generate and maintain an accurate representation of the work-zone.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use multi-sensor fusion algorithms combining LIDAR, radar, and camera data for terrain and obstacle analysis.
DP2: Implement a dynamic geospatial database to represent and update the work-zone model.
DP3: Apply machine learning classifiers for obstacle detection and terrain feature extraction.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use multi-sensor fusion algorithms combining LIDAR, radar, and camera data for terrain and obstacle analysis.

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms
Interface coupling with teleoperation and safety services for real-time updates
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically separates terrain and obstacle analysis but requires well-defined interfaces to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of sensor data streams.
Risk of sensor data fusion errors impacting model accuracy.
High safety criticality demands rigorous validation of detection algorithms.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing terrain and obstacle detection algorithms to reduce coupling and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Central processing and analysis of worksite mapping data including sensor fusion and model generation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams (LIDAR, radar, camera) from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated worksite model and analysis results to Teleoperation for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Issues alerts related to detected obstacles or unsafe terrain conditions to Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core processing is centralized here; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment; mostly sensor data source, risk of duplicated processing if assigned here.
Interface for tasking but not suitable for core mapping processing.
Primarily for alerting, not processing; high diffusion risk if assigned.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping processing within NGHE Solution minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and safety-critical validation.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large or complex.
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional requirements are clearly refined and mapped to logical design parameters with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized processing in NGHE Solution.
Interfaces are well-defined and limited in number.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the appropriate implementation boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via integrated system tests using telemetry inputs and safety alert outputs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Consider further decomposition of NGHE Solution if complexity grows.
Ensure robust telemetry interface validation to mitigate data dependency risks.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the requirements and safety criticality constraints with clear ownership and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Identify and characterize terrain features of the worksite.
FR2: Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Generate and maintain an accurate representation of the work-zone.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Centralized processing within NGHE Solution is feasible.
open_risks: Sensor fusion errors impacting model accuracy.
evidence_needed: Preliminary integration test results of NGHE Solution processing.
